results.requirement_text: The system shall require a user to enter a one-time code after submitting valid login credentials.

test_cases.title: Verify system blocks progression when one-time code is omitted after valid login credentials
test_cases.objective: Confirm that the system enforces the one-time code entry requirement after valid login credentials are submitted
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Submit valid login credentials without providing a one-time code.
steps.expected_result: System prevents progression (e.g., does not allow access to the application).

test_cases.expected_result: System prevents progression when the one-time code is omitted after valid login credentials are submitted.
assumptions: Exact mechanism for submitting login credentials and the subsequent one-time code entry point are not specified.

traceability.coverage_item: System enforces one-time code entry by preventing progression when the code is omitted after valid login credentials are submitted

source_basis: require a user to enter a one-time code after submitting valid login credentials

plans.requirement_text: The system shall require a user to enter a one-time code after submitting valid login credentials.

coverage_items.coverage_item: System enforces one-time code entry by preventing progression when the code is omitted after valid login credentials are submitted

source_basis: require a user to enter a one-time code after submitting valid login credentials
